creator: roberthuff@rcn.com
text:
Specific error message:

huff@jerusalem> pd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg
huff@jerusalem> make clean
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/pkg//provides.so: Undefined symbol "pkg_plugin_set"
make: "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk" line 1222: warning: "/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static version -t 1.19.1 1.17.0" returned non-zero status
